valuePoints: Expanding an Existing Platform Relationship: Losh has been on Rev.io billing since 2021 — PSA deepens platform adoption and unifies service and billing in a single system
ConnectWise Displacement: 25-person UCaaS/VoIP team migrating core service desk operations from ConnectWise to Rev.io PSA
N-able RMM Integration Opportunity: Active N-able environment creates immediate value — RMM alerts auto-generate tickets, managed endpoints sync as assets, eliminating manual handoff
Springfield, MO UCaaS/VoIP Provider: Regional MSP with 25 staff consolidating tooling to reduce overhead and improve operational consistency
Full Stack Consolidation: Bullfrog has run billing, payments, analytics, and DocuSign on Rev.io since 2023 — PSA is the final piece, displacing ConnectWise from the stack entirely
Single Vendor for UCaaS MSP Operations: As a UCaaS/VoIP MSP, Bullfrog gains native PSA-to-billing sync — no more manual handoffs between ConnectWise service ops and Rev.io billing
Payments Already Live: Rev.io Payments AR already processing — PSA expansion extends automation from service ticket all the way through invoice and payment collection
Fewer Integrations, Fewer Failure Points: Billing + Payments + Analytics + PSA under one roof, one support relationship, one data model
